title: rpl_messages.json consumed by Python only; hand-authored (no generator); Python validator has vacuous option_type==4 branch
description: Only python/tests/test_vectors.py:554-677 consumes rpl_messages.json. No Rust consumer (lichen-rpl/tests/mesh_formation.rs is hand-coded scenarios); no C consumer at all (no RPL codec tests under lichen/tests/ - only trickle/). test/vectors/generate.py does NOT generate this file (hand-authored per bead cdmc) - no oracle regeneration path. Worse: the Python validator has no option_type==4 branch (test_vectors.py:636-653 handles only types 5 and 6) so opt_dodag_config_default executes ZERO assertions and passes vacuously; dio_with_options/dao_with_options assert only option type codes, not field contents. The one vector guarding the DODAG Configuration encoding (whose defaults are wrong per mmgu.8) is effectively unvalidated. Fix: add the option_type==4 assertions, add generate.py support, add Rust+C consumers. Relates hnyw.2.2.
